items.name: rsi_meanrev_6_20_80_t100
items.verdict: fallo: DSR 0.00; MC p=0.68; no bate B&H
items.code:
# --- senal (engine._signal, rama 'rsi_meanrev') ---
rsi = RSI(close, 6)            # EWM Wilder, alpha=1/n
reg = close > close.rolling(100).mean()
pos = pd.Series(np.nan, index=close.index)
pos[(rsi < 20) & reg] = 1.0
pos[rsi > 80] = 0.0
pos = pos.ffill().fillna(0.0)

# --- backtest por activo (engine._returns), para cada uno de los 8 (7 FX + oro) ---
pos  = pos.shift(1).fillna(0.0)              # lag-1: decide hoy, aplica maniana
ret  = close.pct_change()
cost = pos.diff().abs().fillna(0.0) * 0.0003 # 3 bps por turnover (spread real)
r_activo = pos * 1.0 * ret - cost          # leverage = 1.0
daily = mean_over_assets(r_activo)           # cartera equal-weight

# --- evaluacion (engine.evaluate) ---
# IS 2014-2020 | OOS1 2007-2013 (crisis 2008) | OOS2 2021-2024
# Deflated Sharpe (contador global) | Monte Carlo (shift circular de la senal) | bate Buy&Hold

items.name: Donchian 146/53
items.code:
# --- senal (engine._signal, rama 'donchian') ---
pos = pd.Series(np.nan, index=close.index)
pos[close > close.rolling(146).max().shift(1)] = 1.0
pos[close < close.rolling(53).min().shift(1)] = 0.0
pos = pos.ffill().fillna(0.0)

# --- backtest por activo (engine._returns), para cada uno de los 8 (7 FX + oro) ---
pos  = pos.shift(1).fillna(0.0)              # lag-1: decide hoy, aplica maniana
ret  = close.pct_change()
cost = pos.diff().abs().fillna(0.0) * 0.0003 # 3 bps por turnover (spread real)
r_activo = pos * 1.0 * ret - cost          # leverage = 1.0
daily = mean_over_assets(r_activo)           # cartera equal-weight

pos = pos.ffill().fillna(0.0)

ret  = close.pct_change()
cost = pos.diff().abs().fillna(0.0) * 0.0003 # 3 bps por turnover (spread real)
r_activo = pos * 1.0 * ret - cost          # leverage = 1.0
daily = mean_over_assets(r_activo)           # cartera equal-weight

pos = pos.ffill().fillna(0.0)

r_activo = pos * 1.0 * ret - cost          # leverage = 1.0
daily = mean_over_assets(r_activo)           # cartera equal-weight

items.name: rsi_meanrev_7_10_65_100
items.code:
# --- senal (engine._signal, rama 'rsi_meanrev') ---
rsi = RSI(close, 7)            # EWM Wilder, alpha=1/n
reg = close > close.rolling(100).mean()
pos = pd.Series(np.nan, index=close.index)
pos[(rsi < 10) & reg] = 1.0
pos[rsi > 65] = 0.0
pos = pos.ffill().fillna(0.0)

# --- backtest por activo (engine._returns), para cada uno de los 8 (7 FX + oro) ---
pos  = pos.shift(1).fillna(0.0)              # lag-1: decide hoy, aplica maniana
ret  = close.pct_change()
cost = pos.diff().abs().fillna(0.0) * 0.0003 # 3 bps por turnover (spread real)
r_activo = pos * 1.0 * ret - cost          # leverage = 1.0
daily = mean_over_assets(r_activo)           # cartera equal-weight

# --- evaluacion (engine.evaluate) ---
# IS 2014-2020 | OOS1 2007-2013 (crisis 2008) | OOS2 2021-2024
# Deflated Sharpe (contador global) | Monte Carlo (shift circular de la senal) | bate Buy&Hold

# --- senal (engine._signal, rama 'rsi_meanrev') ---
rsi = RSI(close, 6)            # EWM Wilder, alpha=1/n

pos = pd.Series(np.nan, index=close.index)
pos[(rsi < 5) & reg] = 1.0
pos[rsi > 63] = 0.0
pos = pos.ffill().fillna(0.0)

items.code:
# --- senal (engine._signal, rama 'ibs') ---
ibs = (close - low) / (high - low)
pos = pd.Series(np.nan, index=close.index)
pos[ibs < 0.15] = 1.0
pos[ibs > 0.89] = 0.0
pos = pos.ffill().fillna(0.0)

# --- backtest por activo (engine._returns), para cada uno de los 8 (7 FX + oro) ---
pos  = pos.shift(1).fillna(0.0)              # lag-1: decide hoy, aplica maniana
ret  = close.pct_change()
cost = pos.diff().abs().fillna(0.0) * 0.0003 # 3 bps por turnover (spread real)
r_activo = pos * 1.0 * ret - cost          # leverage = 1.0
daily = mean_over_assets(r_activo)           # cartera equal-weight

items.verdict: fallo: OOS1(07-13) -0.02; DSR 0.00; MC p=0.60; no bate B&H
items.code:
# --- senal (engine._signal, rama 'rsi_meanrev') ---
rsi = RSI(close, 5)            # EWM Wilder, alpha=1/n
reg = close > close.rolling(200).mean()
pos = pd.Series(np.nan, index=close.index)
pos[(rsi < 15) & reg] = 1.0
pos[rsi > 85] = 0.0
pos = pos.ffill().fillna(0.0)

# --- backtest por activo (engine._returns), para cada uno de los 8 (7 FX + oro) ---
pos  = pos.shift(1).fillna(0.0)              # lag-1: decide hoy, aplica maniana
ret  = close.pct_change()
cost = pos.diff().abs().fillna(0.0) * 0.0003 # 3 bps por turnover (spread real)
r_activo = pos * 1.0 * ret - cost          # leverage = 1.0
daily = mean_over_assets(r_activo)           # cartera equal-weight

# --- evaluacion (engine.evaluate) ---
# IS 2014-2020 | OOS1 2007-2013 (crisis 2008) | OOS2 2021-2024
# Deflated Sharpe (contador global) | Monte Carlo (shift circular de la senal) | bate Buy&Hold

pos = pd.Series(np.nan, index=close.index)
pos[close > close.rolling(110).max().shift(1)] = 1.0
pos[close < close.rolling(55).min().shift(1)] = 0.0
pos = pos.ffill().fillna(0.0)

# --- backtest por activo (engine._returns), para cada uno de los 8 (7 FX + oro) ---
pos  = pos.shift(1).fillna(0.0)              # lag-1: decide hoy, aplica maniana
ret  = close.pct_change()
cost = pos.diff().abs().fillna(0.0) * 0.0003 # 3 bps por turnover (spread real)
r_activo = pos * 1.0 * ret - cost          # leverage = 1.0
daily = mean_over_assets(r_activo)           # cartera equal-weight

# --- evaluacion (engine.evaluate) ---
# IS 2014-2020 | OOS1 2007-2013 (crisis 2008) | OOS2 2021-2024
# Deflated Sharpe (contador global) | Monte Carlo (shift circular de la senal) | bate Buy&Hold

pos[close > close.rolling(135).max().shift(1)] = 1.0
pos[close < close.rolling(69).min().shift(1)] = 0.0
pos = pos.ffill().fillna(0.0)

daily = mean_over_assets(r_activo)           # cartera equal-weight
